action_items.title: Run budget-matched FixedWD control on ImageNet
action_items.description: Measure EqWD's mean effective lambda (average lambda_t^l across all layers and steps during ImageNet training). Run FixedWD at that matched lambda, 3 seeds, 45 epochs. This resolves whether EqWD's advantage comes from adaptive modulation or from applying more total WD.

action_items.title: Resolve WD heatmap lambda discrepancy
action_items.description: Figure 5 colorbar shows lambda_t values ~0.00052-0.00062, but paper states lambda_base=1e-4=0.0001. Minimum heatmap value (0.00052) is 5.2x the stated base. Trace data source, identify whether the experiment used lambda_base=5e-4 or if the heatmap plots a different quantity. If lambda was actually 5e-4, ALL experiment claims need verification.

action_items.title: State ImageNet epoch count (45) in main text
action_items.description: Add 'trained for 45 epochs' to Section 4.1 and Appendix A. Currently only visible in Figure 1 panel title. Standard ImageNet is 90 epochs; omitting this is a reproducibility violation.

action_items.title: Complete CIFAR-10 table with EqWD, CAWD; remove DefazioCorrective
action_items.description: Run EqWD and CAWD on CIFAR-10 (3 seeds, 200 epochs). Remove undefined 'DefazioCorrective' from table or properly define it. The paper's own method missing from a benchmark table is a glaring gap.

action_items.title: Multi-seed beta=5.0 on CIFAR-100
action_items.description: Run EqWD beta=5.0 on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 with 3 seeds. Resolves whether 66.07% single-seed result replicates or is variance artifact.

action_items.title: Run AIS diagnostic on ImageNet
action_items.description: Measure AIS on ImageNet/ResNet-50 for representative layers. Currently only measured on CIFAR-100. Strengthens Contribution 3 (ratio sufficiency) on the benchmark where it matters.

action_items.title: 90-epoch ImageNet comparison
action_items.description: Run EqWD, FixedWD, SWD on ImageNet for 90 epochs, 3 seeds each. Validates that EqWD's advantage transfers to standard training regime.

action_items.title: Fix bibliography entries
action_items.description: Fix defazio2025 arXiv ID (2501.00001 -> 2506.02285). Complete author lists for xie2023swd, chen2026cwd, franke2024cpr, kosson2023, chou2025, he2025alphadecay, loshchilov2023weightnorm, luo2024cautious. Add arXiv IDs for naganuma2026. Fix gotmare2018 year to 2019.

action_items.title: Differentiate EqWD from Defazio's corrective term in Section 2.4
action_items.description: Add 1-2 sentences explicitly distinguishing EqWD's deviation-based modulation from Defazio's LR-schedule corrective term. Also cite AdaDecay (Nakamura & Hong, 2019).

action_items.title: Add VGG-16-BN baselines to Table 5
action_items.description: Add FixedWD and NoWD baselines to the layer-type ablation table, or include cifar_methods_comparison figure to contextualize the 62.81% result.

action_items.title: Add CAWD to Table 1 (method comparison)
action_items.description: CAWD is a key baseline but only appears in Table 2. Add to Table 1 for consistency.

action_items.title: Revise WD heatmap caption to match visual evidence
action_items.description: Current caption overstates modulation. Actual variation is ~20% above baseline. Rewrite to accurately describe modest modulation consistent with CIFAR-100's small ratio deviations.

action_items.title: Generate ImageNet ratio trajectory figure
action_items.description: Show per-layer r_t trajectories on ImageNet to validate the 'layer heterogeneity' claim where it matters. The CIFAR-100 figure shows layers tightly clustered after the transient.

action_items.title: Report best hyperparameters for BO-tuned baselines
action_items.description: Add a table (appendix) showing the best hyperparameters found by Bayesian optimization for each baseline. This enables reviewers to assess tuning quality.

action_items.title: AdamW experiment
action_items.description: Run at least one EqWD + AdamW experiment (e.g., CIFAR-100/ResNet-20). Publishing a WD method tested only on SGDW in 2026 is a significant limitation.

action_items.title: Add code availability statement
action_items.description: Add a footnote or statement about code release (GitHub link or upon-acceptance promise).

summary.key_message: The budget-matched FixedWD experiment and lambda discrepancy resolution are the two most impactful items. The budget-matched experiment was flagged P0-BLOCKING in iter_016 and still not executed. Until it is done, the paper's core contribution claim (adaptive modulation matters) is unfalsifiable. The lambda discrepancy is a potential data integrity issue that could invalidate quantitative claims.
